title: Welcome to Tracker HQ!
message: This is where you'll find the latest updates, hunting tips, and exclusive gear drops. Good luck out there tonight.

title: Major App Update Incoming
message: We are implementing many changes based on user feedback and should have a large update ready within a week. This includes a brand new satellite map tab with pins!

title: Submit Your Best Hunting Photo!
message: Submit your best hunting photo for a chance to be featured in the app! Feel free to include any hunting advice that has helped your success, or your brief hunt story!
